name: manager-flow-kind-selects-runner-tool
description: flow_kind ('ui' default vs 'api') only changes which tool the manager tells the Flow Runner to use: run_playwright_flow with flows/<flow_name>.yaml, or run_api_flow with a registered api_flows.py function name (api_flow_name). Both tools return identically shaped JSON so everything downstream is unaffected.
invariants: DEFAULT_FLOW_KIND lives in config.py and is read by both build_supervisor's parameter default and orchestrator's flow_cfg.get('kind', ...)
contracts: A known_issue_note, when passed, is prepended as context-only framing — the prompt explicitly instructs the manager to re-investigate from real evidence, never to skip
